title: Smoky Spanish Cod Ceviche
description: A refreshing twist on traditional ceviche, featuring smoky Spanish flavors and tender cod.

ingredients.name: Spanish Olive Oil
ingredients.notes: Adds a touch of Mediterranean flair

ingredients.name: Fresh Cilantro
ingredients.notes: Adds a fresh and herbaceous note

instructions: In a large bowl, combine the cod, smoked paprika, lime juice, olive oil, red onion, cilantro, salt, and pepper.
Mix well to combine, being careful not to break up the fish.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, stir the ceviche gently to redistribute the ingredients.
Serve chilled, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
